channel.title: App on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in App on adoption curve dot net

item.title: A listed buildings app for the iPhone
item.description: English Heritage is a non-Departmental Public Body that exists to protect and promote England’s historic environment. One of the tools at their disposal is listing, which applies protection to a building or site through the planning system. Crudely, it stops you putting plastic double glazing into your historic thatched cottage; or demolishing a factory designed by that world-famous architect. There are a lot of listed buildings - about 374,081 of them - and they’re listed in a database which English Heritage made available to the Rewired Culture event.
